Vastu Shastra

Direction is Destiny

The 8 directions of Vastu determine the energy flow in your home and workplace

North (N)
उत्तर — Kuber
Wealth & prosperity. Ideal for main entrance, treasury, study room.
East (E)
पूर्व — Indra
Health & growth. Best direction for main entrance, living room.
NE (Ishan)
ईशान — Shiva
Spirituality & wisdom. Ideal for pooja room, meditation space.
SE (Agni)
आग्नेय — Agni
Fire & energy. Best for kitchen. Avoid bedroom here.
SW (Nairuti)
नैऋत्य — Niruti
Stability & strength. Master bedroom, heavy storage go here.
NW (Vayu)
वायव्य — Vayu
Air & movement. Guest room, garage, or bathroom suitable here.

Who We Are

About Maa Bhagwati Vastu Solutions

Vastu Shastra · Numerology · Property Advisory | Meerut, NCR & Beyond

Raje_v Pushkar

VASTU & NUMEROLOGY ADVISOR

Meerut, Uttar Pradesh

At Maa Bhagwati Vastu Solutions, we combine traditional Vastu Shastra with practical space planning to help homeowners, business owners, and property investors make confident decisions.

Founded by Raje_v Pushkar — with 15+ years of experience in construction, civil project management, and Vastu advisory — we bring both technical knowledge and spiritual insight to every consultation.

We serve clients across Meerut, NCR, and beyond — online and in person. Every consultation is personalized. No templates. No shortcuts.

Client Success Stories

Case Studies

How our structured consultations transformed clients' property decisions and brought harmony to their spaces

Case Study #001: Numerology Consultation for Apartment Selection

Trivandrum, Kerala | UAE Residents | Retirement Home Planning

📍 Client Profile
  • Husband & Wife (Joint Ownership)
  • Current Residence: United Arab Emirates (UAE)
  • Property Location: Trivandrum, Kerala, India
  • Project Type: Premium Residential Apartment
  • Purpose: Future Retirement Home
🎯 The Challenge

Clients received multiple apartment options with different numerological vibrations, requiring expert guidance to select the most suitable.

  • Selecting the most favourable apartment
  • Ensuring compatibility for both spouses
  • Supporting career & financial growth
  • Choosing home suitable for retirement
✅ Outcome

Through structured consultation combining numerological principles with their real-life goals, we guided them to confidently select the right apartment. Clients showed interest in a future Numerology & Vastu Assessment.

Case Study #002: Mixed-Use Building Vastu Analysis

Banda, Uttar Pradesh | Commercial + Residential | Renovation Planning

📍 Project Details

North-facing mixed-use building with commercial ground floor and residential upper floors. Post-construction Vastu assessment conducted before renovation commencement.

⚠️ Key Observations
  • East-Side Staircase positioning concerns
  • Toilet in South-East (Fire element zone)
  • Toilet in South-West (Stability zone)
  • Washroom under staircase configuration
  • Terrace structural considerations
🛠️ Solutions Provided
  • Renovation-oriented practical solutions
  • Zone utilization recommendations
  • Staircase planning alternatives
  • Boundary treatment guidance
  • Floor-wise Vastu compliance report
✅ Outcome

Comprehensive Vastu Analysis Report balanced traditional principles with existing building constraints, delivering practical, implementable solutions for renovation planning.

Recommended Vastu Products

Carefully selected Vastu & Numerology products for your home, office & spiritual growth

Carefully selected by Maa Bhagwati Vastu Solutions, these products are recommended to support a harmonious home, office, temple, and commercial space. Each recommendation is based on traditional Vastu principles, spiritual significance, and practical usability.

Whether you are setting up a new property or enhancing an existing one, these products can complement your environment when selected and placed appropriately.

Important Note

The products featured on this page are general Vastu recommendations based on traditional principles and spiritual practices. Their suitability and effectiveness depend on several factors, including your property's layout, direction, design, and individual requirements.

Every property is unique. Therefore, the selection, quantity, and placement of Vastu products should ideally be determined through a personalized Vastu consultation.

Please note that purchasing these products alone does not guarantee specific results. They are intended to complement a properly planned Vastu environment and should be used as part of a comprehensive Vastu strategy.

For personalized product recommendations, placement guidance, or a complete Vastu assessment, please contact Maa Bhagwati Vastu Solutions.

Affiliate Disclosure

Some links on this page are affiliate links. If you purchase a product through these links, Maa Bhagwati Vastu Solutions may earn a small commission at no additional cost to you.

This support helps us continue providing authentic Vastu guidance, educational resources, and professional consultation services.

We recommend only those products that we believe may be beneficial for Vastu applications, spiritual practices, and creating a balanced living or working environment. However, we encourage you to evaluate each product carefully before making a purchase.
